# Cyntrisec — Confidential AI Infrastructure

## EphemeralML

> AI Clean Room for Inference.
> Per-request cryptographic evidence that inference ran inside a hardware-isolated environment.

### Overview
EphemeralML produces signed receipts (evidence bundles) for every AI inference request. Each receipt contains the model hash, input/output hashes, attestation linkage metadata, and an Ed25519 signature. Human-readable. Machine-verifiable.

Models run inside hardware Trusted Execution Environments (Intel TDX, AMD SEV-SNP, AWS Nitro). Under normal operation, the host relays encrypted traffic and cannot directly decrypt prompts or outputs.

### Key Features
- **Evidence Bundle**: Every inference produces a signed receipt with model hash, I/O hashes, attestation linkage metadata, and Ed25519 signature.
- **Hardware Isolation**: Intel TDX, AMD SEV-SNP, AWS Nitro Enclaves. Verified by hardware attestation.
- **Encrypted Transport**: Attestation-bound X25519 + ChaCha20-Poly1305. 170ns frame encoding, sub-8us per 4KB.
- **GPU Inference**: Llama 3 8B on NVIDIA H100 Confidential Computing. Quantized GGUF models.
- **Multi-Environment**: GCP Confidential Space (TDX), AWS Nitro Enclaves, NVIDIA H100 CC (GCP), Azure path in progress.
- **Open Source**: Rust. Published on crates.io. Apache 2.0 licensed.

### HIPAA Compliance Mapping
- 164.312(a) Access Control → Enclave isolation evidence
- 164.312(b) Audit Controls → Signed receipt evidence
- 164.312(c) Integrity → Model hash + attestation linkage
- 164.312(e) Transmission Security → AEAD encrypted transport

### Links
- **Docs**: https://cyntrisec.com/docs
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/cyntrisec/EphemeralML
- **Transport Library (crates.io)**: https://crates.io/crates/confidential-ml-transport

---

## Cyntrisec CLI

> AWS Security Graph — Attack path discovery optimized for LLMs.

### Installation
```bash
pip install cyntrisec
```

### Features
- **Graph Analysis**: Builds a full capability graph of IAM, network, and dependencies.
- **Agentic Interface**: Native MCP server. Connect Claude Desktop or other agents.
- **Read-Only**: Scans via AssumeRole without modifying infrastructure. No SaaS backend.

### Links
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/cyntrisec/cyntrisec-cli
- **PyPI**: https://pypi.org/project/cyntrisec/
